text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove didn't show up for training, so I go
looking for her inside the academy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Recall the formula we went over? Try
using it here.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Right... So I apply that like this, and... Omigosh! I
did it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Really, this is fairly standard. Maybe you should
devote a little more time to your studies...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you should be fine for the test tomorrow. Do
your best, okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh! Today's training... Ngh, how could I forget?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I take full responsibility, and I'll
make sure it doesn't happen again.
